title: Renovated Townhouse for Sale in Taman Mergong Jaya, Alor Setar.
description:
A fully renovated townhouse for sale in a convenient and established area at:

874A, Taman Mergong Jaya Fasa 3,
Jalan Putra, 05150 Alor Setar,
Kedah Darul Aman

This home is ready to move in. Almost everything inside has been upgraded, making it suitable for families who want a comfortable and practical living space without needing to spend extra on renovation.

⸻

House Condition & Renovation

The entire house has been freshly repainted, giving it a clean and modern look. It feels bright, fresh, and well maintained.

To improve safety and comfort, a new iron gate has been installed at the entrance as an extra security feature.

A new water pump has also been installed, ensuring stable water pressure throughout the house.

For lighting, the house is fitted with downlights, creating a modern and bright indoor environment.

There are also 4 ceiling fans installed inside the house, helping with good air circulation.

All 5 window curtains are brand new, giving the home a clean and complete interior finish.

⸻

Living Room

The living room is simple, comfortable, and ready to use.

It comes with:

* Sofa set
* Coffee table
* Dining table with chairs

This space is suitable for family gathering, guests, and daily relaxation.

⸻

Bedrooms

The bedroom is equipped with basic furniture, making it easy for immediate move-in.

Inside the room:

* 1 air-conditioner
* 1 bed
* 1 wardrobe

The room is designed for comfort, privacy, and rest.

⸻

Bathroom / Shower Area

The bathroom has been upgraded with new fittings for a more comfortable daily use experience.

Includes:

* New shower heater (water heater)
* New wash basin and mirror

The bathroom now feels cleaner, more modern, and more functional.

⸻

Toilet Area

The toilet has also been improved with major upgrades:

* New toilet floor tiles
* Upgraded from squat toilet to sitting toilet

This makes it more modern, comfortable, and easier to use for all ages.

⸻

Kitchen Area

The kitchen is fully equipped and practical for daily cooking.

Includes:

* Small refrigerator
* Installed kitchen cabinets
* New kitchen sink (wash basin)
* New gas stove stand
* New gas stove

The kitchen layout is simple but functional, suitable for everyday cooking needs.

⸻

Key Highlights

* Fully renovated and move-in ready
* Fresh paint throughout the whole house
* New iron gate for added security
* New water pump installed
* Modern lighting with downlights
* 4 new ceiling fans
* 5 brand new curtains
* Fully furnished living room
* Equipped bedroom
* Upgraded bathroom and toilet
* Fully functional kitchen setup

⸻

Ideal For

This townhouse is suitable for:

* Small to medium families
* First-time home buyers
* Buyers looking for a ready-to-move-in home
* Investors looking for rental property in Alor Setar

⸻

Final Note

This property offers a good combination of comfort, convenience, and value. With all the renovations already completed, the new owner can move in immediately without extra cost or hassle.

For viewing or more information, feel free to contact the owner.

Mr Heng 0124015777
